articles.title: Israel says new head of Hamas' military wing killed in Gaza City strikes
articles.summary: At least three people were killed in the attacks, which came despite a ceasefire with Hamas being in place.

articles.title: Dozens killed in Lebanon as Israel intensifies strikes
articles.summary: Israel says it struck 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and fighters in Lebanon, after PM Benjamin Netanyahu vows to "crush" the Iran-backed group.

articles.title: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire
articles.summary: The attacks took place while Iranian and Qatari negotiators were in Doha for peace talks.

articles.title: Can EU find a Russia whisperer to mediate an end to war in Ukraine?
articles.summary: With the US pulling out of trilateral talks with Russia and Ukraine, the EU is looking for potential candidates to step in.

articles.title: First Ghanaians set to be repatriated from South Africa over anti-immigrant protests
articles.summary: It follows recent protests against illegal immigration that have led to fears there could be a resurgence in xenophobic violence.

articles.title: Russia 'relentlessly targeting' critical infrastructure and democracy, GCHQ says
articles.summary: The spy agency's head will set out threats facing the UK and the measures she believes need to be taken to confront them on Wednesday.

articles.title: Hundreds of children die within months as measles cases soar in Bangladesh
articles.summary: The country has recorded more than 60,000 suspected cases of measles in just over two months.

articles.title: Attorney General Ken Paxton routs veteran incumbent Cornyn in Texas Senate primary
articles.summary: The race will help determine whether Democrats can win back control of the US Senate for the last half of the Trump presidency.

articles.title: One killed and nine missing after chemical explosion at US paper mill
articles.summary: Nine others were injured and another nine are missing after a tank ruptured at a paper mill in Longview, Washington.

articles.title: Four killed as school minibus collides with train in Belgium
articles.summary: Two schoolchildren, their chaperone and the minibus driver were killed in the crash, says a Belgian minister.
